skills.name: Bludgeoner
skills.description: Raises attack as your weapon loses sharpness. Also boosts ranged weapon melee attacks and odds of stunning.

levels.description: Raises attack as your weapon loses sharpness. Also boosts ranged weapon melee attacks and odds of stunning.

skills.name: Critical Draw
skills.description: Increases affinity when performing draw attacks.

skills.name: Slugger
skills.description: Makes it easier to stun monsters.

skills.name: Heroics
skills.description: Increases attack power and defense when health drops to 35% or lower.

levels.description: While active, increases defense by 50 points.
While active, increases attack power by 5% and increases defense by 50 points.
While active, increases attack power by 5% and increases defense by 100 points.
While active, increases attack power by 10% and increases defense by 100 points.
While active, increases attack power by 15% and increases defense by 100 points.
While active, increases attack power by 25% and increases defense by 150 points.
While active, increases attack power by 40% and increases defense by 150 points.

skills.name: Marathon Runner
skills.description: Slows down stamina depletion for actions which continuously drain stamina (such as dashing).

skills.name: Tremor Resistance
skills.description: Grants protection against ground tremors.

levels.description: Nullifies minor ground tremors and reduces the effects of major ground tremors.
Nullifies minor and major ground tremors.
